description: Steer Corp builds AI-powered Vedic astrology products, including a ChatGPT app and an upcoming API for astrology calculations and AI-generated reports. Its site focuses on personalized birth-chart analysis, dashas, panchang, transits, and related astrology features.
summary: steercorp.io publicly advertises one upcoming HTTP API surface, Steer Intelligence API; no public OpenAPI spec, authentication details, GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI were found.
